title: Elytra Durability Warning
description: Get warnings when your elytra is about to break.
body:
# Elytra Durability Warning

Stop breaking your Elytra mid-flight. This simple mod alerts you the moment your durability drops to **10%**, so you can land safely.

**Features**
* **Visual Alert:** A bright red warning appears in chat.
* **Audio Cue:** Plays a high-pitched sound to grab your attention.
* **No Lag:** The code is optimized to only run when you are actually wearing an Elytra.
![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e47ca8f2a34125e16be77e5381663cf3ae22ca41.png)
